subcodes.first_line: O Parsí friends! Every people hath had an auspicious day, on which they have held great festivals and celebrations filled with joy and delight
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران پارسیان هر قومی از اقوام روز فیروزی داشتند و در آن روز جشن عظیم برپا نمودند
subcodes.subjects: @praise of Eastern values; culture, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @predictions and prophecies
